lyrics.text: Hello darkness, my old friend
lyrics.translation: 别来无恙,黑暗,我的老友

lyrics.text: I've come to talk with you again
lyrics.translation: 我又来同你叙叙旧

lyrics.text: Because a vision softly creeping
lyrics.translation: 因为一道幻象悄悄来临

lyrics.text: Left its seeds while I was sleeping
lyrics.translation: 趁我入睡时播下了种子

lyrics.text: And the vision that was planted in my brain
lyrics.translation: 那在我的脑海中生长的幻象

lyrics.text: Still remains
lyrics.translation: 仍然滞留

lyrics.text: Within the sound of silence
lyrics.translation: 在寂静之声中

lyrics.text: In restless dreams I walked alone
lyrics.translation: 在一次不安的梦境中我独自徘徊

lyrics.text: Narrow streets of cobblestone
lyrics.translation: 流连于狭窄的卵石道上

lyrics.text: Neath the halo of a street lamp
lyrics.translation: 伫立在路灯微弱的光线下

lyrics.text: I turned my collar to the cold and damp
lyrics.translation: 寒冷与潮湿的侵袭使我竖起衣领

lyrics.text: When my eyes were stabbed by the flash of a neon light
lyrics.translation: 当我察觉眼睛被霓虹灯光刺痛时

lyrics.text: That split the night
lyrics.translation: 灯光划破夜空

lyrics.text: And touched the sound of silence
lyrics.translation: 触到那寂静之声

lyrics.text: And in the naked light I saw
lyrics.translation: 在那无遮蔽的灯光下我看见

lyrics.text: Ten thousand people, maybe more
lyrics.translation: 成千上万的人们,也许更多

lyrics.text: People talking without speaking
lyrics.translation: 人们说而不言

lyrics.text: People hearing without listening
lyrics.translation: 人们听而不闻

lyrics.text: People writing songs that voices never share
lyrics.translation: 人们谱写从未被吟唱的乐章

lyrics.text: And no one dare disturb the sound of silence
lyrics.translation: 没有人敢去惊动那寂静之声

lyrics.text: "Fools" said I, "You do not know
lyrics.translation: “傻子,你们根本不知道.”我说,

lyrics.text: Silence like a cancer grows"
lyrics.translation: “寂静早已犹如癌症一般生长”，

lyrics.text: Hear my words that I might teach you
lyrics.translation: 细细聆听我教你们的说的话语,

lyrics.text: Take my arms that I might reach you
lyrics.translation: 紧握我递给你们的手臂.”

lyrics.text: But my words like silent raindrops fell
lyrics.translation: 但是我的话如同雨滴般无声落下

lyrics.text: And echoed in the wells of silence
lyrics.translation: 回荡在寂静的深井里

lyrics.text: And the people bowed and prayed to the neon god they made.
lyrics.translation: 人们朝着他们创造的虚幻的神（霓虹灯）低头祈祷

lyrics.text: And the sign flashed out its warning
lyrics.translation: 而霓虹灯广告牌却在一闪一闪发出警告,

lyrics.text: And the words that it was forming
lyrics.translation: 它展现出来的话语是:

lyrics.text: And the sign said:"The words of the prophets are written on the subway walls
lyrics.translation: “先知者的语言就在地铁站墙上,

lyrics.text: and tenement halls
lyrics.translation: 就在贫民的住房中,

lyrics.text: And whispered in the sound of silence."
lyrics.translation: 还在于寂静之声中的低语."
